backend/main.mo: Defines a canister with a Symptom type and a getTreatment function that returns rule-based medical guidance with disclaimers.
feature_evidence.json: Report mapping implemented features to related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of key frontend files in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based styles defining a healthcare-themed OKLCH color system for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file loading the React app root and main entrypoint.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component that renders the chat page and notification toaster.
frontend/src/features/chat/backendMappin: Creates backend Symptom payloads with user principals for API calls.
frontend/src/features/chat/ChatPage.tsx: Implements the full chat interface including message flow, red-flag detection, backend calls, and error handling.
Provides the initial onboarding prompt requesting key medical context from the user.
frontend/src/features/chat/types.ts: Defines TypeScript types for chat messages, roles, and statuses.
frontend/src/features/chat/useTreatmentM: React Query mutation that sends symptom descriptions to the backend using the user's identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Initializes and manages the backend actor, refetching when Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication via Internet Identity, exposing login state and identity management.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables for a healthcare-oriented color system.
frontend/src/lib/medicalGuardrails.ts: Provides red‑flag detection, dosing‑caution checks, and automatic injection of medical disclaimers into chatbot replies.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity provider, loading global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, typography, containers, and animations using CSS variables for the app’s theme.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, features, requirements, and architectural notes for the healthcare chatbot.
